CodyReichert/awesome-cl

10 days ago  1.6k
A curated list of awesome Common Lisp frameworks, libraries and other shiny stuff.
View byDAY/WEEK/README
View on Github

Jun 21st

Community

  • #lisp on Libera Chat - IRC channel for all Lisp dialects.
  • #clschool on Libera Chat - IRC channel for learning Common Lisp.
  • #lispcafe on Libera Chat - IRC channel for off-topic discussions.
  • #commonlisp on Libera Chat - main Common Lisp IRC channel.

    • May 3rd

    Emacs

  • quicklisp-systemsstars19 - Search, browse and load Quicklisp systems from Emacs.

    • May 1st

    Javascript

  • sigilstars0 - A Parenscript to

    • Apr 25th

    Library Manager

  • CLPM - A package manager for Common Lisp that strives to cleanly separate the package manager process itself from the client image that uses it. BSD_2Clause.
  • Qlotstars242 - A project-local library installer, similar to Bundler or Carton. Expat.
  • Quicksys - install systems from multiple Quicklisp distributions. MIT.

    • Websockets

  • Portalstars10 - Portable websockets for Common Lisp using usocket. LLGPL.

    • Apr 14th

    Crypto

  • crypto-shortcutsstars19 - Collection of common crypto shortcuts. zlib.

    • Persistent object databases

  • ubiquitousstars20 - A library providing easy-to-use persistent configuration storage. zlib.

    • GUI

  • 👍 Qtoolsstars168 - A Qt toolkit, based on CommonQt. zlib Also Qtools-uistars29 (premade UI components), with videos.

    • Language extensions

  • dissect - when a lot of projects use the “trivial-backtrace” system that just gives them a string with a backtrace, Dissect allows you to capture, step, and completely inspect the stack trace on a variety of Lisp implementations. Also very useful for logging and other situations where execution is automatically continued, but the information of the current stack is still useful to store somewhere. zlib.

    • Portability layers

  • trivial-argumentsstars16 - A portable library to retrieve the arguments list of a function. zlib.
  • definitionsstars10 - a general definitions introspection library. It gives you the ability to retrieve definitions or bindings associated with designators such as symbols, packages, and names in general. zlib.

    • Iteration

  • for - A concise, lispy and extensible iteration macro. Unlike loop it is extensible and sensible, and unlike iterate it does not require code-walking and is easier to extend. zlib.

    • Parsing html

  • 👍 Plumpstars87 - A lenient HTML/XML parser, tolerant on malformed markup. zlib. Best used with lquerystars65 and clssstars24.

    • HTML generators and templates

  • clip - An HTML template processor where the templates are written in HTML. zlib.

    • Deployment

  • deploy - A toolkit for binary deployment of Lisp applications, with extra support for foreign shared libraries. zlib.

    • Matrix libraries

  • 3d-matrices - A library implementing common matrix calculations, with an emphasis on 2x2,3x3, and 4x4 matrices as commonly used in graphics. It provides some numerical functions as well, but those are not the focus. The library is heavily optimised, so it is not made of pretty code. zlib.

    • Event processing

  • simple-tasksstars12 - A very simple task scheduling framework. zlib.
  • deedsstars18 - Deeds is an Extensible Event Delivery System. It allows for efficient event delivery to multiple handlers with a complex event filtering system. zlib.

    • Writing, running scripts

  • cl-allstars11 - A script to run Lisp snippets in multiple implementations. This allows you to quickly compare implementation behaviour and differences. zlib.

    • Unit Testing

  • Parachutestars32 - An extensible and cross-compatible testing framework. With test dependencies, conditions, fixtures and restarts. zlib.

    • Data validation

  • ratifystars21 - A collection of utilities to ratify, validate and parse inputs. zlib.

    • Documentation builders

  • Staplestars45 - a tool to generate documentation pages using an HTML template. Uses the existing README, adds docstrings, crossreferences and links to the CLHS. zlib.

    • Files and directories

  • pathname-utilsstars5 - A collection of utilities to help with pathname operations. zlib.

    • Git

  • legit - an interface to the Git binary. zlib.

    • i18n

  • oxenfurtstars12 - A client library for the Oxford dictionary API. zlib.
  • language-codes - A database library for ISO language codes. zlib
  • system-locale - A library to retrieve the user's preferred language, so that your application may choose a sensible default. zlib.
  • multilang-documentation - Allows writing docstrings in multiple languages, for truly internationally documented libraries. zlib.

    • Logging

  • verbose - A fast and highly configurable logging framework. zlib.

    • Apr 12th

    Game Development

  • Trialstars190 - Trial is an OpenGL game engine with a heavy focus on modularity. It is supposed to provide a large toolkit of useful bits and pieces from which you can create a game. zlib.
  • cl-mpg123 and cl-out123, bindings libraries for libmpg123 and libout123 respectively, giving you fast and easy to use mp3 decoding and cross-platform audio output. zlib.
  • trivial-gamekit – with this small framework you would be able to make simple 2D games: draw basic geometric forms, images and text, play sounds and listen to mouse and keyboard input. MIT.
  • cl-gamepad - Access to gamepads and joysticks on Windows, Mac OS, and Linux. zlib.
  • viralitystars63 - A component-based game engine written in Common Lisp MIT.

    • Apr 10th

    Shells, shells interfaces

  • Lishstars17 - lish may someday be a lisp shell. GPL3.
    • supports tab-completion of executables in the path and Lisp symbols, allows to write and to mix shell commands and Lisp code, has a tiny REPL and an interactive debugger, and more.

    • C

  • cl-cxx-jitstars18 - Common Lisp and C++ interoperation with JIT. MIT.

    • Apr 4th

    JSON

  • cl-jsonstars0 - A highly customizable JSON encoder and decoder. MIT.

    • Web frameworks

  • Snoozestars140 - A RESTful web framework. Web server agnostic. Currently has support for Hunchentoot and Clack. Routes are just functions and HTTP conditions are just Lisp conditions. LLGPL.

    • Apr 1st

    Statistics

  • lisp-stat - an environment for statistical computing, conceptually similar to R, that is also suitable for front-line production deployments. "It grew out of a desire to have an environment for rapidly prototyping analytical and A.I. solutions, and move directly to production environments with minimal friction."
    • https://lisp-stat.dev/
    • ships Luke Tierney's XLisp-Stat (a predecessor of R) as well as newer libraries.

    • Actors pattern

  • 👍 cl-gserverstars65 - an Erlang inspired GenServer. It is meant to encapsulate state, but also to execute async operations. Also with actors. Functionality regarding state is not unsimilar to Clojure's Agent or cl-actors. MIT.

    • Mar 22nd

    Iteration

  • doplusstars2 – another extensible iteration library, similar to :for.

    • Mar 11th

    System administration

  • Consfiguratorstars10 - Lisp declarative configuration management system. You can use it to configure hosts as root, deploy services as unprivileged users, build and deploy containers, and produce disc images. GPL3.

    • Feb 27th

    Monitoring

  • rollbar.lispstars2 - interface to Rollbar.com, an error tracking software.

    • Feb 12th

    Isomorphic web frameworks

  • CLOGstars200 - The Common Lisp Omnificent GUI. Uses web technology to produce graphical user interfaces for applications locally or remotely. BSD_3Clause.
    • CLOG is based on the ideas of GNOGA, a framework the author wrote for Ada and used in commercial production code since 2013.
  • Interactive SSR - ISSR allows you to make interactive web pages without writing client scripting. No knowledge about Javascript or DOM is necessary.
    • it is not unlike Phoenix LiveView or Hotwire.
  • Weblocksstars76 - A widgets-based framework with a built-in ajax update mechanism that "solves the JavaScript problem". LLGPL.

    • Feb 11th

    XML

  • CXML - XML parser and serializer, with a range of extension libraries. LLGPL.
    • 👍 has an incremental parser, allowing to parse big files.

    • Emacs

  • Emacs4CLstars153 - A tiny Emacs initialization file to quickly set up vanilla Emacs for Common Lisp programming. Comes with a line-by-line explanation of every line of code in the initialization file.

    • Jan 25th

    Docker images

  • cl-docker-images - Docker images for ABCL, CCL, ECL, and SBCL on Windows (amd64) and Alpine and Debian (amd64, arm64, arm/v7) BSD_2Clause.

    • Jan 13th

    Shells, shells interfaces

  • cmdstars31 - utility for running external programs. Protects against shell interpolation, built with multi-threaded programs in mind, Windows support. MIT.
    • uiop:run-program (synchronous) and uiop:launch-program (async) are shipped with ASDF and available on all modern implementations. See the CL Cookbook: running external programs.

    • Jan 6th

    Web Development

  • Lisp for the Web - A book that walks you through building a voting web application in three tiers.
  • Section on Web Development in The Common Lisp Cookbook - An introductory tutorial covering web server setup, routing, weblocks, templating, error handling, packaging, hot reloading, database connection, and deployment, amongst other topics in the current lisp web development ecosystem.

    • Numerical and Scientific

  • Vellumstars30 - Data Frames for Common Lisp. BSD_2Clause.
  • rtg-mathstars44 - a selection of the math routines most commonly needed for making realtime graphics in lisp (2, 3 and 4 component vectors, 3x3 and 4x4 matrices, quaternions, spherical and polar coordinates). BSD_2Clause.

    • Matrix libraries

  • magiclstars143 - Matrix Algebra proGrams In Common Lisp based on BLAS/LAPACK and Expokit, by Rigetti Computing. BSD_3Clause.
  • lisp-matrixstars60 - A matrix package. FreeBSD.

    • Statistics

  • common-lisp-statstars160 - Common Lisp statistics library. FreeBSD.

    • Utils

  • cmu-infixstars20 - A library for writing infix mathematical notation in Common Lisp. See also polisherstars3.

    • Dec 17th, 2020

    Library Manager

    Interfaces to other package managers

  • flatpack-common-lisp - A BuildStream project for building Flatpak based runtime environments for Common Lisp applications.

    • Javascript

  • ⭐ Parenscript - A translator from Common Lisp to Javascript. 3-clause BSD. See Trident-modestars62, an Emacs mode that provides live interaction with the browser.unlicence.
    • paren6stars13 - a set of ES6 macros for Parenscript.

    • Parallelism and Concurrency

  • calispelstars19 - CSP-like channels for common lisp. With blocking, optionally buffered channels and a "CSP select" statement. ISC-style.
    • "It is complete, flexible and easy to use. I would recommend Calispel over Lparallel and ChanL." @Ambrevar. discussion

    • Date and time

  • ⭐ local-time - A development library for manipulating date and time information in a semi-standard manner. 3-clause BSD.

    • Plotting

  • ADW-Charting - A simple chart drawing library written completely in Common Lisp. Also includes a backend to Google's chart service. BSD-like.

    • Dec 14th, 2020

    Data Structures

  • bststars6 - Binary Search Tree. GPL3.

    • Dec 12th, 2020

    VSCode

  • commonlisp-vscode - an extension to support syntax highlight, auto completion, documentation on hover, go to definition, compile & load file, REPL. It is On GitHubstars29.
  • strict-paredit-vscode - structural editing and navigation like Emacs.

    • Nov 11th, 2020

    Clojure

  • ABCLJstars70 - dead easy Clojure to Common lisp interop. EPL-2.0.

    • Other books

  • Building Problem Solvers (PDF) by Ken Forbus and Johan de Kleer, made available for free by MIT Press - a unique book among standard artificial intelligence texts in combining science and engineering, theory and craft to describe the construction of AI reasoning systems, and including code illustrating the ideas.

    • Nov 6th, 2020

    Machine Learning

  • clmlstars224 - originally developed by Mathematicl Systems Inc., a Japanese company. With a tutorial. LLGPL.

    • Oct 29th, 2020

    Iteration

  • gtwiwtgstars33 - A lazy sequences library. Similar to 'series' but not as complete. However it has a 'modern' API with stuff like take, filter, for, fold, etc. that is easy to use.

    • Oct 26th, 2020

    Units

  • physical-quantitiesstars26 - a library that provides a numeric type with optional unit and/or uncertainty for computations with automatic error propagation. GPL2

    • Text Parsers

  • parseqstars13 - a library for parsing sequences such as strings and lists using parsing expression grammars. Inspired by Esrap. GPL2.

    • Compression / decompression

  • zippystars5 - A ZIP archive format library based on 3bz. zlib.

    • Data Structures

  • 👍 FSet - A functional, set-theoretic collections data structure library. LLGPL.

    • Language extensions

  • hu.dwim.walker - a code walker and unwalker (aka AST parser and unparser). BSD. See also this blog post.

    • Lambda shorthands

  • f-underscore - a tiny library of functional programming utils. (f_ (+ _ _)) -> (lambda (_) (+ _ _)). Public domain.

    • HTTP clients

  • 👍 Dexadorstars221 - An HTTP client, that aims at replacing Drakma. MIT.

    • Job processing

  • cl-cronstars3 - A simple tool that provides cron like facilities. GPL3.

    • Files and directories

  • ⭐ uiop and its pathname package (replaces cl-fad). uiop is part of ASDF3 and as thus is shipped in many implementations. MIT.

    • PDF

  • cl-pslib - a (thin) wrapper around the pslib library for generating PostScript files. Also cl-pslib-barcode. LLGPL.

    • XML

  • xmlsstars6 - A small, simple, non-validating XML parser. 3-clause BSD.

    • Oct 22nd, 2020

    Graphics

  • cl-cudastars185 - A library to use NVIDIA CUDA in Common Lisp programs. LLGPL.

    • Text Parsers

  • ⭐ esrapstars43 - Packrat parser. Expat.
  • texpstars4 - A DSL to generate TeX. AGPL-3.0.

    • Compression / decompression

  • chipzstars14 - A decompression library. 3-clause BSD.
  • Salza2 - A library for creating compressed data. FreeBSD.

    • GUI

  • LispWork's CAPI - A portable GUI toolkit, with mobile runtime. Proprietary, but comes with a free version.

    • HTML generators and templates

  • flutestars46 - An easily composable HTML5 generation library with the most simplistic syntax. MIT.
  • lsxstars61 and markupstars27 - Two JSX-like templating engines, where HTML tags are Common Lisp code. markup comes with an Emacs package.

    • Parallelism and Concurrency

  • STMXstars204 - High performance Transactional Memory for Common Lisp. LLGPL.

    • REPLs

  • sbclistars46 - a readline REPL for SBCL. With completion, quick commands, optional syntax highlighting (with pygments), and no interactive debugger. GPL3.

    • Oct 12th, 2020

    Graphics

  • cl-liballegrostars35 - Interface and bindings to the Allegro 5 game programming library. zlib.

    • Oct 8th, 2020

    C, C++

  • with-c-syntaxstars101 - a fun package which introduces the C language syntax into Common Lisp. (Yes, this package is not for practical coding, I think.) WTFPL Licence.

    • Function extensions

  • cl-advice - an attempt of portable layer advice library for SBCL, CCL, LispWorks and Allegro. Not in Quicklisp.

    • Oct 5th, 2020

    HTTP Servers

  • 👍Clackstars878 - A web application environment inspired by Rack and WSGI. LLGPL. Provides a unified interface to a webserver of choice (default is Hunchentoot). With more getting started guide.

    • Oct 1st, 2020

    Iteration

  • trivial-dostars7 - Additional dolist style macros for Common Lisp. MIT.
  • piclstars11 - An (almost) complete port of Python's itertools package, complete with laziness where applicable, and not relying on cl-cont. MIT.

    • Sep 30th, 2020

    Wrappers

  • cl-mangostars1 - A minimalist CouchDB 2.x database client. BSD_3Clause. See also clouchdb - Library for interacting with CouchDB. FreeBSD.

    • Sep 19th, 2020

    HTTP Servers

    Hunchentoot plugins

  • 👍 easy-routesstars27 - a routes handling system on top of Hunchentoot. It supports dispatch based on HTTP method, arguments extraction from the url path, decorators, url generation from route name, etc. MIT.

    • Linting, code formatting

  • sblintstars89 - a linter for Common Lisp source code using SBCL, suited for Reviewdog (slides). BSD_2Clause.
  • trivial-formatterstars13 - code formatter for Common Lisp. MIT.

    • Sep 15th, 2020

    Non-deterministic, logic programming

  • Temperancestars43 - logic programming. MIT. A focus on performance, with General Game Playing in mind.

    • Sep 14th, 2020

    APL

  • Aprilstars249 - The APL programming language (a subset thereof) compiling to Common Lisp. Replace hundreds of lines of number-crunching code with a single line of APL. Apache2.

    • Iteration

  • snakesstars35 - Python style generators for Common Lisp. Includes a port of itertools. Apache2.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • sparserstars35 - A natural language understanding system for English. Eclipse.

    • Regex

  • one-more-re-nightmarestars26 - a fast-ish regular expression compiler in Common Lisp. BSD_2Clause.

    • Shells, shells interfaces

  • Cleshstars49 - extends Common Lisp to embed shell code in a manner similar to perl's backtick. FreeBSD.

    • Text Parsers

  • cl-yaccstars45 - a LALR(1) parser generator. MIT.
  • cl-shlexstars6 - simple lexical analyzer for shell-like syntaxes. MIT.
  • smugstars88 - parser combinators for Common Lisp. SMUG makes it simple to create quick extensible recursive descent parsers without funky syntax or impenetrable macrology. MIT.

    • i18n

  • gettextstars5 - a port of the gettext runtime to Common Lisp. GPL3.

    • Sep 13th, 2020

    Data validation

  • json-schemastars5 - A library for validating data against schemas of drafts 4, 6, 7, and 2019-09 of the JSON Schema standard. LLGPL.

    • Sep 8th, 2020

    Python

  • burgled-batteriesstars98 - A bridge between Python and Common Lisp. The goal is that Lisp programs can use Python libraries. Not available on Quicklisp. MIT.

    • Changing the syntax

  • ⭐ cl-interpolstars38 - A set of reader modifications to allow string interpolation. BSD.

    • Email

  • mailgunstars9 - A thin wrapper to post HTML emails through mailgun.com. unlicence.

    • Deployment

  • cubestars28 - Kubernetes client library for Common LISP generated from the Swagger specification. MIT.

    • Parallelism and Concurrency

  • Moirastars24 - Monitor and restart background threads. In-lisp process supervisor. MIT.

    • Caching

  • clachestars2 - General caching facility. LLGPL.

    • Graph databases

  • factsstars32 - an in-memory graph database with transactions and rollbacks, logging/replay and dumping/loading to/from disk. BSD-style license (ISC).

    • C, C++

  • ecrepl - an interactive REPL for the C language. BSD_2Clause.

    • Iteration

  • ⭐ iterate - An iteration construct for Common Lisp which is extensible and Lispier. MIT.

    • Crypto

  • cl-ssh-keysstars6 - Common Lisp system for generating and parsing of OpenSSH keys. BSD_3Clause.
  • cl-bcryptstars8 - Common Lisp system for parsing and generating bcrypt password hashes. BSD_3Clause.
    • see also cl-passstars23, using pbkdf2.

    • Aug 20th, 2020

    JSON

  • cl-json-pointerstars5 - A JSON Pointer implementation. MIT.

    • Aug 17th, 2020

    Graph databases

  • cl-agraphstars18, a minimal client for AllegroGraph. AllegroGraph is a horizontally distributed, multi-model (document and graph), entity-event knowledge graph technology. It is proprietary and has a free version with a limit of 5 million triples.
  • cl-neo4jstars22 - neo4j RESTFUL client interface.

    • Aug 6th, 2020

    Sublime Text

  • Sublime Text (proprietary) has Common Lisp support with its SublimeREPL and Slyblimestars25 packages. Slyblime is an implementation of SLY and it uses the same backend (SLYNK). It ships advanced features including a debugger with stack frame inspection.

    • Jul 31st, 2020

    Community

  • /r/learnlisp - a subreddit to ask questions and get help about Lisp

    • Jul 18th, 2020

    HTTP Servers

    Hunchentoot plugins

  • hunchentoot-errorsstars4 - Augments Hunchentoot error pages and logs with request and session information. MIT.

    • Jul 17th, 2020

    Library Manager

    Interfaces to other package managers

  • linux-packaging - build .deb, .rpm or .pkg packages for your application with a single ASDF declaration. Uses fpm under the hood. MIT.
  • cl-brewerstars9 - Homebrew formula builder for (command line) common lisp applications. Public domain.

    • Jul 11th, 2020

    Others

  • 👍 cl-formsstars20 - Web forms handling library for Common lisp. MIT.

    • Jul 10th, 2020

    HTTP Servers

    Hunchentoot plugins

  • hunchentoot-authstars1 - implementing user authentication with passwords. BSD.

    • Plotting

  • kaistars72 - A high-level plotter library for Common Lisp. A wrapper around the Plotly JS library. MIT.
  • cl-sparkstars82 - sparkline strings for the console: (spark '(1 1 2 3 5 8)) => "▁▁▂▃▅▇". MIT.

    • Graph databases

  • vivace-graphstars106 - graph database & Prolog implementation. Takes design inspiration from CouchDB, neo4j and AllegroGraph. It implements an ACID-compliant object graph model with user-defined indexes and map-reduce views. It also implements a master / slave replication scheme for redundancy and horizontal read scaling. Querying the graph is accomplished via a number of Lisp methods or via a Prolog-like query language. MIT.

    • Jul 9th, 2020

    Web Development

  • Lisp Web Tales - Simple tutorials using hunchentoot, cl-redisstars156, restasstars245, SEXMLstars21, Postmodernstars276, and more.

    • Jun 30th, 2020

    Geany (experimental)

  • Geany-lispstars6 is an experimental lisp mode for the Geany editor.

    • Jun 24th, 2020

    Intermediate

  • Lisp Tips - A blog with useful tips and tricks. A continuation of Common Lisp tips.
  • Lisp project of the day - A blog showcasing many Lisp libraries.

    • May 10th, 2020

    Beginner

  • Lisp Koansstars2.8k - The project guides the learner progressively through many Common Lisp language features.

    • May 6th, 2020

    Persistent object databases

  • bknr.datastorestars62 - a CLOS-based lisp-only database in RAM with transaction logging persistence. Manual. licence. (see also chap. 21 of "Common Lisp Recipes")

    • Apr 30th, 2020

    Migration tools

  • cl-migratumstars16 - a system which provides facilities for performing database schema migrations, designed to work with various databases. BSD_3Clause.
  • postmodern-passenger-pigeonstars6 - a migration manager for postmodern. No licence specified.

    • Apr 21st, 2020

    Advanced

  • Programming Algorithms - A comprehensive guide to writing efficient programs with examples in Lisp.

    • Job processing

  • SBCL's timers, system-wide event schedulers.

    • Apr 14th, 2020

    HTML generators and templates

  • TENstars18 - the completness of Djula meets the usability of Eco. MIT.

    • Writing, running scripts

  • clawkstars34 - an AWK implementation embedded into Common Lisp, to search files for lines and perform specified actions on its fields. BSD-style.
  • ScriptLstars62 - Shell scripting made Lisp-like! Or, live-coding remote function calls for the shell. Write a command in the REPL, and run it instantly in the shell. LLGPL.

    • Command-line options parsers

  • 👍 Unix-optsstars78 - a command line options parser with a concise declaration of options. MIT.
  • CLONstars43 - a Command Line Options Nuker, with lots of options. ISC.

    • Readline, ncurses and other graphical helpers

  • replicstars18 - helpers to turn existing code into a readline application, with a focus on defining the completion of the commands' arguments. Also comes as a ready to use executable, that transforms a user's lispy init file into readline commands. MIT.
  • cl-ansi-termstars22 - print colorized text, horizontal lines, progress bars, (un)ordered lists and tables on ANSI-compliant terminals. GPL3.

    • Shells, shells interfaces

  • shclstars246 - a POSIX-like shell in Common Lisp. Apache2.0.
  • Shellystars66 - execute Common Lisp functions like a shell command, without the need to write a command line arguments parser. And it also can be used as a Make-like build-tool. FreeBSD.

    • System administration

  • Adamsstars137 - UNIX system administration in Common Lisp. Not unlike Ansible, Chef or Puppet. ISC.

    • Other scripting utilities

  • WCLstars62 [staled] - allow hundreds of Lisp

    • XML

  • Buildnodestars16 - A common lisp library to ease interaction with CXML-dom, such as building Excel spreadsheets. BSD.

    • Mar 17th, 2020

    Erlang

  • CLERICstars34 - a Common Lisp Erlang Interface. An implementation of the Erlang distribution protocol, comparable with erl_interface and jinterface. MIT.

    • Apps

  • CodePlayground - an iPhone and iPad app with Lisp support via CCL.

    • Mar 10th, 2020

    Vim & Neovim

  • Vlimestars284 - VLIME: Vim plus Lisp Is Mostly Evil. A Common Lisp dev environment for Vim (and Neovim). MIT.

    • Community

  • Common Lisp chat - Keybase team with well-defined rules and retention policies.

    • Mar 5th, 2020

    GUI

  • cl-cffi-gtkstars29 - Binding for GTK+3. GNU LGPL2.1.

    • Deployment

  • s2i-lispstars25 - Source-to-Image builder image based on CentOS or alternatively RHEL7 for building Common LISP images for OpenShift (and also Docker). It features an up-to-date SBCL with Quicklisp installation, SLIME or SLY integration and allows customization via environment variables. Apache2

    • Matrix libraries

  • clemstars36 - a matrix library. BSD_2Clause.

    • REPLs

  • magic-edstars18 - a tiny editing facility, where you can directly load, edit, manipulate and evaluate file or file content from the REPL, when going to a full IDE is too much. MIT.

    • Security

  • cl-isolatedstars23 - A restricted environment for Common Lisp code evaluation AGPL-3.0.

    • Feb 19th, 2020

    Monitoring

  • cl-sentry-clientstars11 - a Sentry client for Common Lisp, the cloud-based error monitoring system. MIT.

    • Feb 15th, 2020

    Graphics

  • cl-jpegstars17 - Baseline JPEG encoder and decoder library. 3-clause BSD.

    • Feb 11th, 2020

    C

  • cl-bindgenstars20 - A command line tool and library for creating Common Lisp language bindings from C header files. MIT.

    • C, C++

  • Software-Evolution-Librarystars92 - The SEL enables the programmatic modification and evaluation of software (C/C++ support using Clang, compiled assembler, and linked ELF binaries). GPL3.

    • Feb 5th, 2020

    Readline, ncurses and other graphical helpers

  • Linedit - Readline-style library that provides customizable line-editing features. MIT-style.

    • Feb 3rd, 2020

    Iteration

  • gmap - A concise and extensible iteration facility that has the advantage of integrating well with FSet (see the Data Structures section), as it was written by the same author. In Quicklisp as part of misc-extensions. Public domain.

    • Typing

  • defstar - a collection of macros for easy inclusion of type declarations for arguments in lambda lists. GNU GPL3

    • Numerical and Scientific

  • array-operationsstars35 - a collection of functions and macros for manipulating Common Lisp arrays and performing numerical calculations with them. MIT.
  • cl-geometrystars43 - a system for two dimensional computational geometry for Common Lisp. MIT.

    • Jan 24th, 2020

    C

  • cl-gobject-introspectionstars29 - Gobject Introspection FFI. Automatic bindings to call into the C library. BSD. Generate a lisp interface with gir2clstars5. LGPL3.

    • Jan 6th, 2020

    Docker images

  • base-lisp-imagestars32 - base Docker image for Common Lisp projects with SBCL or CCL and the latest ASDF, Qlot and Roswell.

    • Online editors

  • Judge0 IDE is an online editor which supports Common Lisp (SBCL). MIT.

    • Dec 14th, 2019

    GUI

  • IUPstars90 - CFFI bindings to the IUP Portable User Interface library (pre-ALPHA). IUP is cross-platform (Windows, macOS, GNU/Linux, with new Android, iOs, Cocoa and Web Assembly drivers), has many widgets, has a small api and is actively developed.

    • Dec 13th, 2019

    Language extensions

  • rutilsstars183 - radical yet reasonable syntactic utilities for Common Lisp. MIT.

    • Machine Learning

  • mglstars284 - used by its author to winstars124 the Higgs Boson Machine Learning Challenge. MIT.

    • Dec 9th, 2019

    Language extensions

  • ⭐ triviastars213 - Optimized pattern-matching library. LLGPL.

    • Nov 26th, 2019

    Database

  • cl-yesqlstars34 - SQL statements live in their own files, in SQL syntax, and are imported into Lisp as functions. You are not limited to the features a DSL supports. Based on Clojure's Yesql. MIT.

    • Nov 19th, 2019

    Data Structures

  • 👍 strstars183 - a modern, simple and consistent string manipulation library. MIT.
  • trivial-extensible-sequencesstars8 - Portability library for the extensible sequences protocol (SBCL documentation). zlib.

    • Language extensions

  • generic-clstars78 - Generic function interface to standard Common Lisp functions (equality, comparison, arithmetic, objects, iterator, sequences,…). MIT. See also the more lightweight generic-comparabilitystars12. LLGPL.

    • Changing the syntax

  • cl21stars848 - An experimental project to move Common Lisp into the 21st century. Expat.
  • clampstars64 - Arc language's brevity and conciseness to Common Lisp. Artistic License 2.0.
  • cl-syntaxstars34 - Reader syntax conventions. LLGPL.
  • cl-2dsyntax - An indentation-sensitive reader system. Not available on Quicklisp. Public domain.
  • cl-annotstars119 - Python-like annotations for Common Lisp. LLGPL.
  • pythonic-string-readerstars13 - A simple and unobtrusive read table modification inspired by Python's three quote strings. BSD_3Clause.
  • cl-readerstars6 - A utility library

    • Files and directories

  • ppathstars26 - Common Lisp's

    • Git

  • git-apistars14 - Common Lisp library

    • Nov 12th, 2019

    JSON

  • jonathanstars125 - A JSON encoder and decoder. MIT.

    • Community

  • Planet Lisp - A meta blog that collects the contents of various Lisp-related blogs.

    • Nov 3rd, 2019

    CLOS extensions

  • filtered-functionsstars33 - enable the use of arbitrary predicates for selecting and applying methods. MIT.

    • Oct 18th, 2019

    Persistent object databases

  • cl-prevalence - in-memory database system. Implementation of Object Prevalence, in which business objects are kept live in memory and transactions are journaled for system recovery. github forkstars16. LLGPL. See also cl-prevalence-multimasterstars2, to syncronize multiple cl-prevalence systems state.

    • Graphics

  • pngload-fast - A PNG (Portable Network Graphics) image format decoder in portable Common Lisp with an emphasis on speed. MIT.

    • HTTP clients

  • fast-httpstars323 - A fast HTTP request/response parser for Common Lisp. MIT.

    • HTTP Servers

  • zaservestars6 - A portable fork of AllegroServe, by Franz Inc. LLGPL.
  • cl-http2-protocolstars102 - a pure Common Lisp transport agnostic implementation of the HTTP/2 protocol at draft-14. MIT.

    • HTTP Servers

    Hunchentoot plugins

  • hunchentoot-cgistars4 - a library for executing CGI scripts from the hunchentoot webserver. BSD.
  • hunchentoot-multi-acceptorstars1 - Route multiple domains (virtual hosts) on a single hunchentoot acceptor using a single port. Apache2.0.

    • Numerical and Scientific

  • avmstars38 - Efficient and expressive arrayed vector math library with multi-threading and CUDA support. MIT.

    • Parallelism and Concurrency

  • cl-coroutinestars47 - a coroutine library. It uses the CL-CONT continuations library in its implementation. MIT.

    • Actors pattern

  • erlangenstars62 - Distributed, asynchronous message passing system for Clozure Common Lisp. GNU GPL3.
  • Actorsstars8 package for LispWorks (announce) MIT.
  • common-lisp-actorsstars94 - a simple and easy to use Actor system. BSD_2Clause.
  • memento-moristars26- a library for writing robust, actor-based systems. It draws inspiration from Erlang/OTP, particularly its crash-first approach to high-availability systems, as well as Akka. MIT.

    • Oct 11th, 2019

    Javascript

  • remote-jsstars29 - send JavaScript from Common Lisp to a browser. MIT.

    • Sep 29th, 2019

    Library Manager

    Interfaces to other package managers

  • dh-quicklisp-buildappstars7 - debhelper utility to let you compile your quicklisp-based Common Lisp code into a buildapp binary in a .deb with almost no effort. MIT.

    • Sep 17th, 2019

    Function extensions

  • cl-hooksstars13 - Hooks extension point mechanism (as known, e.g., from GNU Emacs). LGPL.
  • method-hooks - When CLOS method combination allow only one hook per method, this library allows an arbitrary number of them. Mozilla Public Licence.

    • Typing

  • cl-algebraic-data-typestars86 - A library for defining algebraic data types in a similar spirit to Haskell or ML. 3-clause BSD.
  • 👍 trivial-typesstars56 - provides missing but important type definitions such as proper-list, association-list, property-list and tuple. LLGPL.

    • Aug 25th, 2019

    Configuration

  • chameleonstars8 - a configuration management library shipped with profile support. MIT.

    • CLOS extensions

  • inlined-generic-functionstars107 -

    • Logging

  • a-cl-loggerstars12 - Logging library providing context sensitive logging of more than just strings to more than just local files or output streams. Features logstash support, json support, logger hierarchies, context sensitive logging, objects printed as an inspectable presentation,…

    • Aug 23rd, 2019

    Numerical and Scientific

  • linear-programming – a library for solving linear programming problems. MIT.

    • Aug 22nd, 2019

    Other

  • trivial-utf8 - A small library for doing UTF-8-based I/O. BSD.

    • Reference

  • Common Lisp Standard Draft (pdf) - The standard draft of the Common Lisp specifications, in a well formatted PDF with a sidebar.

    • Jul 30th, 2019

    Parallelism and Concurrency

  • swank-crewstars33 - distributed computation framework implemented using Swank Client. BSD_3Clause.

    • Jul 20th, 2019

    Lambda shorthands

  • cl-punchstars14 - Scala-like anonymous lambda literals. (mapcar ^(* 2 _) '(1 2 3 4 5)). MIT.

    • Jul 10th, 2019

    Data validation

  • sanity-clausestars28 - a data serialization/contract library for Common Lisp. Schemas can be property lists or class-based, allowing to check slots' types during make-instance. LLGPL.

    • Jul 8th, 2019

    CLOS extensions

  • specialization-storestars28 - generic functions based on types. Simplified BSD License variant.

    • Jul 7th, 2019

  • Lisp Discord Server

    • Jun 27th, 2019

    Beginner

  • Practical Common Lisp - A good introductory text to Common Lisp, with practical examples. Better read with a Firefox add-onstars10.

    • Jun 22nd, 2019

    .Net Core

  • Bikestars85 - a cross-platform .Net Core interface. MIT.

    • Miscellaneous

  • Foil - A foreign object interface; works with the JVM and CLI. Not available on Quicklisp. CPL 1.0.

    • Jun 21st, 2019

    Natural Language Processing

  • babel2stars2 - A Fluid Construction Grammar implementation, computational framework, and unification-based grammar formalism Apache2.0.

  • repl-utilitiesstars39 - Ease

    • Documentation builders

  • mgl-paxstars38 - Exploratory

    • May 23rd, 2019

    Python

  • cl4pystars54 - The library cl4py (pronounce as clappy) allows Python programs to call Common Lisp libraries. MIT.
  • py4clstars119 - A library that allows Common Lisp code to access Python libraries. It is basically the inverse of cl4py. MIT.
  • cl-pythonstars317 - an implementation of Python in Common Lisp. LLGPL.

    Parallelism and Concurrency

  • cl-gearmanstars19 - a library for the Gearman distributed job system. LLGPL.

  • cl-colliderstars144 - A

    • Numerical and Scientific

  • cl-anastars162 - Common Lisp data analysis library with emphasis on modularity and conceptual clarity. It aims to be a general purpose framework for analyzing small and large scale datasets, including binned data analysis and visualization. GNU GPL3.

    • May 15th, 2019

    Numerical and Scientific

  • numclstars575 - Numpy clone in Common Lisp. LGPL3.

    • CSV

  • ⭐ cl-csvstars90 - A library for parsing CSV files. 3-clause BSD.

    • Apr 17th, 2019

    CSV

  • auto-textstars9 - automatic (encoding, end of line, column width, csv delimiter etc) detection for text files. MIT. See also inquisitorstars28 for detection of asian and far eastern languages.

    • Apr 8th, 2019

    Atom

  • SLIMAstars56 allows you to interactively develop Common Lisp code, turning Atom into a pretty good, and actively developped, Lisp IDE. MIT.

    • Apr 3rd, 2019

    Unit Testing

  • Rovestars106 - Rove is a unit testing framework for Common Lisp applications. It is intended to be a successor of Provestars214. 3-clause BSD.

    • Mar 26th, 2019

    Numerical and Scientific

  • Petalispstars219 - an attempt to generate high performance code for parallel computers by JIT-compiling array definitions. It works on a more fundamental level than NumPy, by providing even more powerful N-dimensional arrays, but just a few building blocks for working on them. AGPL-3.0.

    • Mar 13th, 2019

    Parallelism and Concurrency

  • trivial-monitored-thread - a Common Lisp library offering a way of spawning threads and being informed when one any of them crash and die. MIT.

    • Mar 1st, 2019

    GUI

  • ⭐ ltk - A binding for the Tk toolkit. LLGPL or GNU LGPL2.1.
    • LTk Examples - Provides LTk examples for the tkdocs tutorial.
    • LTk Plotchart - A wrapper around the tklib/plotchart library to work with LTk. This includes over 20 different chart types (xy-plots, gantt charts, 3d-bar charts etc...).

    • Library Manager

  • Ultralisp - A Quicklisp distribution which updates every 5 minutes and to which one can add his project in one click. BSD.

    • Deployment

  • cl-aws-runtime-teststars28 - An example of using Common Lisp (SBCL) as a custom runtime on AWS lambda. WTFPL.

    • Feb 20th, 2019

    Notebooks

  • common-lisp-jupyterstars110 - A Common Lisp kernel for Jupyter along with a library for building Jupyter kernels, based on Maxima-Jupyter by Robert Dodier which was based on cl-jupyter by Frederic Peschanski. MIT.

    • Feb 16th, 2019

    PDF

  • cl-typesettingstars47 and cl-pdfstars77 - cross-platform Common Lisp libraries for generating PDF files. FreeBSD.

    • Feb 14th, 2019

    Web frameworks

  • radiancestars224 - A web application environment and framework . Artistic License 2.0.

    • Others

  • maiden - A bot and chat system framework with support for IRC and more. Artistic License 2.0.

    • Feb 12th, 2019

    Email

  • trivial-imapstars0 - tries to make easy some common cases of working with IMAP servers, like reading emails from the server. A thin wrapper over post-office library (which is a fork of Franz's cl-imap). BSD.
  • mito-email-authstars3 - Helper to authenticate a website's users by sending them unique code by email.

    • Feb 11th, 2019

    GUI

  • nodgui - Bindings for the Tk toolkit, based on Ltk, with syntax sugar and additional widgets. LLGPL.

    • Jan 30th, 2019

    Data Structures

  • cl-ctriestars101 -

    • Monitoring

  • prometheus.clstars70 - Prometheus.io client. Grafana dashboard for SBCL and Hunchentoot metrics (memory, threads, requests per second,…). MIT.

    • Jan 12th, 2019

    XML

  • xpathstars4 (homepage - Implementation of the XML Path Language (XPath) Version 1.0. BSD_2Clause.

    • Jan 8th, 2019

    Audio

  • Open Musicstars141 - a visual programming, computer-aided composition environment. GPL3.
  • OM7stars135 - a new implementation of the OpenMusic visual programming and computer-aided composition environment including a number of improvements on graphical interface, computational mode, and connection to external software libraries. GPL3.
  • Incudine - Music/DSP programming environment for Common Lisp. Useful to design software synthesizers or sound plugins from scratch. It is also a compositional tool that allows to produce high quality sounds controllable at the sample level, defining and redefining the digital signal processors and the musical structures on-the-fly.

    • Dec 21st, 2018

    Vim & Neovim

  • quicklisp.nvim - A Quicklisp frontend for Neovim.

    • Dec 20th, 2018

    HTTP clients

  • Carrierstars32 - A lightweight, async HTTP client built on top of cl-async and fast-http. MIT.

    • Iteration

  • series - Functional style without any runtime penalty at all. MIT.

    • Lambda shorthands

  • fnstars16 - a couple of lambda shorthand macros. (fn* (+ _ _)) --> (lambda (_) (+ _ _)). Public domain.

    • Numerical and Scientific

  • Xectostars33 - A library for regular array parallelism. 3-clause BSD.

    • Event processing

  • event-gluestars11 - simple eventing abstraction. No dependencies. It can be used anywhere you need a generic event handling system. MIT.

    • Dec 18th, 2018

    Eclipse

  • Dandelionstars23 - a Common Lisp plugin for the Eclipse IDE.

    • Dec 13th, 2018

    Vim & Neovim

  • Slimv_boxstars6 - slimv in a Docker container.

    • Dec 11th, 2018

    Implementations

  • Corman Lispstars520 - a Common Lisp development environment for Microsoft Windows running on Intel platforms. MIT.

    • Dec 6th, 2018

    Documentation builders

  • cl-bibtexstars20 - A compatible re-implementation of the BibTeX program in Common Lisp, with a BST-to-CL compiler. GNU LGPL2.1.

    • Nov 30th, 2018

    Data Structures

  • genhashstars10 – hash table implementation with API from generic methods. Public domain.

    • Nov 14th, 2018

    Community

  • /r/Common_Lisp - subreddit about Common Lisp
  • common-lisp.net
  • lisp-lang.org

    • Nov 8th, 2018

    HTTP Servers

    Clack plugins

  • clack-static-asset-middlewarestars1 - a cache-busting static asset middleware for the clack. MIT.

    • Oct 30th, 2018

    Build Systems

  • ⭐ ASDF - Another System Definition Facility; a build system for Common Lisp. Expat.

    • Crypto

  • ⭐ Ironcladstars99 - A library of crypto functions for Common Lisp. Not considered secure, but is still useful for the message digest functions. Expat.

    • ORMs

  • ⭐ clsql - An SQL database with a Common Lisp interface. LLGPL.
  • 👍 mitostars184 - An ORM for Common Lisp with migrations, relationships and PostgreSQL support LLGPL. mitho-authstars16, a mixin class for use authorization; mito-attachmentstars9, a mixin class for file management outside of RDBMS.

    • Wrappers

  • ⭐ postmodern - A library for interacting with PostgreSQL. zlib.
  • cl-sqlitestars54 - Bindings for SQLite. Public domain.
  • cl-memcachedstars18 - Fast, thread-safe interface to the Memcached object caching system. Expat.
  • cl-mongostars125 - MongoDB client. Expat.
  • cl-redisstars156 - Redis client. Expat.
  • cl-disquestars12 - Disque client. 3-clause BSD.
  • cl-rethinkdbstars43 - RethinkDB client. Expat.

    • Tools

  • pgloaderstars3.4k - a data loading tool for PostgreSQL. PostgreSQL Licence.

    • C

  • ⭐ CFFIstars290 - Portable, easy-to-use C foreign function interface. Expat.
  • 👍cl-autowrapstars169 - Automatically parses header files into CFFI definitions. FreeBSD.

    • Graphics

  • ⭐ Sketchstars1k - A CL framework for the creation of electronic art, graphics, and lots more. MIT.
  • common-cvstars46 - the OpenCV (Open Source Computer Vision Library) binding library for CommonLisp. No license specified.

    • GUI

  • ⭐ CommonQtstars99 - A Common Lisp binding for Qt4 via QtSmoke. FreeBSD.

    • Implementations

  • ⭐ SBCL - A fork of CMUCL; compiles to machine code. Standard compliance. Public domain, with some parts under Expat and 3-clause BSD.
  • ⭐ CCL - Clozure Common Lisp; compiler-only implementation, generates native code. LLGPL.
  • ECL - Embeddable Common Lisp; compiles to C. GNU LGPL2.1.
  • CLASPstars1.8k - a new Common Lisp implementation that seamlessly interoperates with C++ libraries and programs using LLVM for compilation to native code. This allows Clasp to take advantage of a vast array of preexisting libraries and programs, such as out of the scientific computing ecosystem. LGPL2.1 (and others).

    • Language extensions

  • ⭐ alexandria - A general-purpose utility library. Public domain.

    • CLOS extensions

  • ⭐ closer-mop - A compatibility layer that rectifies many absent or incorrect MOP features. Expat.

    • Library Manager

  • ⭐ Quicklisp - A library manager containing many libraries, with easy depencency management. Expat.
  • 👍Roswellstars1.3k - a Lisp implementation installer, script launcher and more. MIT.

    • HTTP Servers

  • ⭐ Hunchentoot - A web server. 2-clause BSD

    • Querying HTML/DOM

  • 👍 lquerystars65 - A jQuery-like HTML/DOM manipulation library. Artistic License 2.0.

    • HTML generators and templates

  • 👍 spinneretstars163 - Common Lisp HTML5 generator. Expat.
  • ⭐ cl-who - The venerable HTML generator. FreeBSD.
  • ⭐ Djulastars106 - A port of Django's template engine to Common Lisp. Expat.

    • Websockets

  • 👍 usocketstars151 - A portable TCP and UDP socket interface. Expat.

    • Parallelism and Concurrency

  • ⭐ BordeauxThreads - Portable, shared-state concurrency. Expat.
  • ⭐ lparallelstars199 - A library for parallel programming. 3-clause BSD.
  • lfarmstars87 - distributing work across machines (on top of lparallel and usocket). BSD_3Clause

    • Regex

  • ⭐ cl-ppcre - Portable, Perl-compatible regular expressions. FreeBSD.

    • Writing, running scripts

  • 👍 Roswellstars1.3k - a lisp installer and scripting environment (helper, launcher, installer) and more. MIT.

    • Emacs

  • ⭐ Slimestars1.4k - Superior Lisp Interaction Mode for Emacs; a full-blown environment for Common Lisp inside of Emacs. Public domain.
  • 👍 Slystars794 - SLY is a fork of SLIME and contains multiple improvements upon it.
  • 👍 Portacle - A portable and multiplatform Common Lisp environment: SBCL, Quicklisp, Emacs, Slime, Git.

    • Unit Testing

  • ⭐ FiveAMstars142 - Simple regression testing framework. FreeBSD.

    • Configuration

  • 👍 py-configparser - reads and writes Python's ConfigParser-like configuration files. MIT.

    • Logging

  • ⭐ log4clstars51 - Logging framework modelled after Log4J. Apache2.0. Advanced integration with Slime.
    • log4cl-jsonstars2 - JSON appender extension. BSD.

    • Oct 28th, 2018

    Data validation

  • clavierstars12 - General purpose validation library for Common Lisp. MIT.

    • Oct 24th, 2018

    Non-deterministic, logic programming

  • Screamer+stars4 - increasing the expressiveness of SCREAMER. MIT.

    • Oct 13th, 2018

    CSV

  • cl-decimalsstars19 - Decimal number parser and formatter. Public domain.

    • Oct 10th, 2018

    YAML

  • cl-yacclyamlstars12 - a pure lisp YAML processor (loader, but not yet dumper). GPL3.
  • cl-yamlstars46 - a YAML parser and emitter built on top of libyaml. MIT.

    • Oct 8th, 2018

    i18n

  • cl-i18n - an i18n library. Load translations from GNU gettext text or binary files or from its native format. Localisation helpers of plural forms. LLGPL.

    • Sep 28th, 2018

    Readline, ncurses and other graphical helpers

  • cl-progress-barstars13 - progress bars, just like in Quicklisp ! MIT.

    • Sep 26th, 2018

    Third-party APIs

  • zs3stars33 - A library for working with Amazon's Simple Storage

    • Aug 22nd, 2018

    Reactive programming

  • Cellsstars156 - an implementation of the dataflow programming paradigm, reactive spreadsheet-like expressiveness for CLOS. Used to build an algebra learning system. With documentationstars16. Lisp LGPL.

    • Job processing

  • clerkstars13 - a cron-like scheduler with sane DSL. MIT.

    • Aug 21st, 2018

    Contract programming

  • quid-pro-quostars81 - a contract programming library in the style of Eiffel’s Design by Contract ™. Public domain.

    • Beginner

  • Learn X in Y minutes - Where X = Common Lisp - Small Common Lisp tutorial covering the essentials.
  • Successful Lisp - A good book for beginners with some programming background.

    • Aug 12th, 2018

    Graphics

  • okra - CFFI bindings to Ogre. Not available on Quicklisp. 3-clause BSD.

    • Javascript

  • Wuweistars75 - A toolkit to build Ajax-based web pages. MIT.

    • Aug 7th, 2018

    Implementations

  • GNU CLISP - A GNU implementation; contains a compiler and an interpreter. Standard conformance. GNU GPL3.

    • Jul 16th, 2018

    HTML generators and templates

  • cl-closure-templatestars69 - Implementation of Google's Closure templates. LLGPL.

    • Jul 12th, 2018

    HTTP Servers

    Clack plugins

  • live-reloadstars5 - Live reload prototype for clack. LLGPL.

    • i18n

  • enchantstars10 - bindings for the Enchant spell-checker library. Public domain.

    • Graphics

  • lisp-magick-wandstars11 - ImageMagick bindings. BSD. Not in Quicklisp.

    • Jun 8th, 2018

    Deployment

  • heroku-buildpack-common-lisp - A Heroku buildpack that uses Roswell to compile Common Lisp applications. LGPL3.

    • Language extensions

  • arrow-macrosstars81 - Clojure-like threading macros. MIT.

    • JSON

  • json-mopstars46 - A metaclass for bridging CLOS and JSON objects. MIT.

    • Jun 6th, 2018

    Non-deterministic, logic programming

  • cl-prolog2stars21 - Common Interface to ISO Prolog implementations from Common Lisp. MIT.

    • May 24th, 2018

    Date and time

  • cl-date-time-parserstars16 - Parse date-time-string, liberally. Hides the difference between date-time formats, and enables to manage date and time as the one date-time format. MIT.
  • local-time-durationstars15 -

    • May 2nd, 2018

    Text Processing

  • wiki-lang-detectstars28 -

    • Apr 7th, 2018

    Event processing

  • cl-flowstars50 - Data-flowish computation tree library for non-blocking concurrent Common Lisp. MIT.

    • Mar 16th, 2018

    Others

  • Postmasterstars6 - A simple, easy-to-use SMTP/IMAP library. Expat.
  • cl-selenium-webdriverstars28 - a binding library to Selenium 2.0.

    • Cryptocurrencies

  • emotiqstars93 - a next-generation blockchain with an innovative natural-language approach to smart contracts. MIT.

    • Feb 12th, 2018

    Graphics

  • cl-svgstars32 - A basic library for producing SVG files. Expat.
  • Varjostars181 - Lisp to GLSL translator. BSD_2Clause.

    • Feb 8th, 2018

    Readline, ncurses and other graphical helpers

  • cl-readlinestars29 - a set of functions to edit lines as they are typed in, to maintain a list of previously-entered command lines, to recall and reedit them and perform csh-like history expansion. Emacs and vi editing modes. GPL3.

    • Text Processing

  • mk-string-metricsstars17 - Calculate various string metrics efficiently in Common Lisp (Damerau-Levenshtein, Hamming, Jaro, Jaro-Winkler, Levenshtein, etc). MIT.

    • Feb 6th, 2018

    Graphics

  • dufystars37 - exact color manipulation and conversion in various color models. MIT.

    • Jan 28th, 2018

    Reference

  • Minispec - A friendlier, but less-complete, version of CLHS. Also contains documentation for some commonly-used CL libraries (such as Alexandria).

    • Jan 26th, 2018

    Job processing

  • psychiqstars44 - redis-based background job processing for Common Lisp applications. Inspired by Ruby's Sidekiq and compatible with its web UI. LLGPL.

    • Jan 19th, 2018

    Tools

  • lakestars71 - a GNU make like build utility. MIT.

    • Graphics

  • opticlstars166 - a library for representing and processing images. BSD_2Clause.

    • Jan 18th, 2018

    Readline, ncurses and other graphical helpers

  • cl-charmsstars112 - an interface to libcurses in Common Lisp. It provides both a raw, low-level interface to libcurses via CFFI, and a more higher-level lispier interface. MIT.

    • Jan 17th, 2018

    To third parties

  • cl-influxdbstars20 - an interface to the Time Series Database InfluxDB. MIT.

    • Jan 16th, 2018

    Lem

  • Lemstars915 - a ready to use, Emacs-like, Slime-based editor tailored for Common Lisp development. With ncurses and Electron interfaces. MIT. See also: an opengl frontendstars22, Lem in Dockerstars3, lem-paretostars15.

    • REPLs

  • cl-replstars111 - an ipython-like REPL. With completion, shell commands, magic commands, debugger, etc. MIT. With colorthemesstars10.

    • Jan 10th, 2018

    GUI

  • ceramic - Desktop web apps with Electron. Expat.
    • Electron app skeleton: electron-sbcl-sqlitestars16

    • Objective-C

  • objc-lisp-bridgestars31 - A portable reader and bridge for interacting with Objective-C and Cocoa. MIT.

    • To third parties

  • dynastars19 - an AWS DynamoDB ORM. MIT.

    • Jan 9th, 2018

    Reference

  • Simplified Common Lisp reference - The simplified version of CLHS.

    • Beginner

  • Casting SPELs in LISP - A fun way to learn LISP while reading a comic book.

    • Jan 8th, 2018

    Data Structures

  • sycamorestars83 - a fast, purely functional data structure library. BSD_3Clause.
  • pileup - a portable, performant, and thread-safe binary heap for Common Lisp. MIT.

    • C, C++

  • cmacrostars744 - Lisp macros for C. MIT.
  • C-merastars291 - a source-to-source compiler that utilizes Lisp's macro system for meta programming of C-like languages. GPL3.
  • lispcstars475 - a powerful "lispsy" macrolanguage for C. MIT.

    • Emacs

  • cl-devel2 - a Docker container for Common Lisp development environment. Ships SBCL, CCL, Roswell and Emacs25 with Slime.

    • Jan 7th, 2018

    CLOS extensions

  • defclass-stdstars31 - a shortcut macro to write DEFCLASS forms quickly. LLGPL.

    • Jan 6th, 2018

    Cryptocurrencies

  • cl-monero-toolsstars10 - Common Lisp toolbox to work with the Monero cryptocurrency. GPL3. Not in Quicklisp.
  • peercoin-blockchain-parserstars2 - parse the blockchain contained in a file and export some of its data to a text file, a SQL script or a database. It can also create a database using the RPC of a Peercoin daemon as source of data instead of a blockchain file. LGPL3. Not in Quicklisp.
  • peercoin-calculatorstars1 - This program gives you the probability of generating a POS or POW block within 10 minutes, 24 hours, 31 days, 90 days and 1 year, as well as the reward that can be expected. GUI in Qt. GPL3. Not in Quicklisp.
  • peercoin-votestars5 - A voting system based on data from the blockchain (addresses and balances). GPL3. Not in Quicklisp.

    • Jan 5th, 2018

    Non-deterministic, logic programming

  • Screamerstars182 - augment Common Lisp with practically all of the functionality of both Prolog and constraint logic programming languages. Blog post solving Project Euler puzzles. MIT.

    • Language extensions

  • serapeumstars236 - Another general-purpose utility library. Expat.
  • anaphora - A collection of anaphoric macros. Public domain.

    • Jan 4th, 2018

    Reference

  • Common Lisp the Language - The original standard for Common Lisp before the ANSI spec.
  • CLOS MOP specification - A modern public domain online version of chapters 5 and 6 of The Art of the Metaobject Protocol

    • Date and time

  • chronicitystars57 - A natural language date and time parse, to parse strings like "3 days from now". BSD_3Clause.

    • Documentation builders

  • sphinxcontrib-cldomainstars13 - Extending Sphinx to cover Common Lisp. To build documentation with the same ease as sphinx would a Python project. GPL3
  • Codexstars79 - A beautiful documentation system for Common Lisp. MIT.

    • Files and directories

  • osicat - A lightweight operating system interface on POSIX-like systems (directory iteration and deletion, environment variables, file permissions, etc) Expat.

    • i18n

  • cl-localestars20 - A simple i18n library. LLGPL.

    • Jan 3rd, 2018

    Library Manager

    Interfaces to other package managers

  • qldebstars4 - Quicklisp systems to debian packages, along with deb-packagerstars4 (simply create a debian package by defining an s-expression) and an introductory blog post. Both MIT.
  • ql-to-debstars21 - Update cl-* debian packages from Quicklisp releases. WTFPL.

    • Dec 31st, 2017

    HTTP Servers

    Clack plugins

  • hermeticstars34 - Security for Clack-based web applications. Expat.

    • Dec 17th, 2017

    Other

  • coronastars43 - Create and manage virtual machines from Common Lisp http://eudoxia.me/corona MIT.

    • Dec 15th, 2017

    Web frameworks

  • ninglestars205 - A super-micro web framework. LLGPL. ninglexstars23, an extended and noob-friendly ningle (mostly easier handling of query parameters). MIT.

    • Dec 6th, 2017

    Machine Learning

  • antik - a foundation for scientific and engineering computation in Common Lisp. GPL. Also mgl-matstars47 and LLAstars83.

    • Nov 29th, 2017

    HTTP Servers

    Clack plugins

  • clack-errorsstars25 - Error page middleware for Clack. LLGPL.

    • Nov 27th, 2017

    Build Systems

  • asdf-vizstars33 - a tool to visualize the library dependencies of ASDF systems, the call graph of a function and the class inheritances. LLGPL.

    • Javascript

  • SmackJackstars17 - An Ajax Common Lisp Library using parenscript to generate javascript and hunchentoot (for now) as the web server. Also allows a server-side lisp function to call a client-side parenscript one. MIT.

    • Nov 25th, 2017

    Beginner

  • Lisp Quickstart - A good tutorial to get up and code Common Lisp quickly.

    • Nov 24th, 2017

    Third-party APIs

  • Aws-sign4stars15 - Common Lisp library for Amazon Web Services signing version 4. GNU GPL3.

    • Nov 21st, 2017

    Text Processing

  • montezumastars35 - Full-text indexing and search for Common Lisp. Expat.

    • Configuration

  • envystars50 - Configuration switcher. FreeBSD.

    • Nov 8th, 2017

    URI handling

  • quristars81 - Another URI library for Common Lisp. Supports userinfo, IPv6 hostname, encoding/decoding utilities,… BSD_3Clause.

    • Oct 30th, 2017

    Unit Testing

  • Check-itstars41 - A QuickCheck-style randomized property-based testing. LLGPL.

    • Oct 24th, 2017

    HTTP Servers

    Clack plugins

  • clathstars22 - a single sign-on middleware for Clack. It allows basic login with OAuth1.0a, OAuth2 and OpenID. At the time of writing, it supports authentication from Google, Twitter, LinkedIn, StackExchange, Reddit and Github. Apache2.0.
  • clack-pretendstars10 - a testing and debugging tool for clack. Apache2.0.

    • Oct 8th, 2017

    Unit Testing

  • Mockingbirdstars16 - A small stubbing and mocking library for Common Lisp. Can also check wether a stubbed function was called, how many times and with which arguments. MIT.

    • Oct 5th, 2017

    Notebooks

  • cl-jupyterstars192 - A Common Lisp kernel for Jupyter notebooks custom licence.
  • Darkmatterstars337 - A notebook-style Common Lisp environment. MIT.

    • Sep 26th, 2017

    Others

  • find-portstars13 - Programmatically find open ports. MIT.

    • Sep 6th, 2017

    Assets management

  • Rockstars42 - an asset manager for Common Lisp. It's basically a combination of Bower and webassets. MIT.

    • Sep 2nd, 2017

    Static site generators

  • coleslawstars472 and its coleslaw-clistars5 - Flexible Lisp Blogware similar to Frog, Jekyll, or Hakyll. BSD.

    • Sep 1st, 2017

    XML

  • cl-feedparserstars16 - A Common Lisp (RSS, Atom) feed parser. LLGPL

    • Plotting

  • eazy-gnuplotstars48 - a lispy, structure-less Gnuplot library. With its cookbook. LLGPL

    • Jul 30th, 2017

    Unit Testing

  • cl-coverallsstars29 - a helper library to post test coverage to Coveralls. See SBCL's code coverage tool. FreeBSD.

    • Jul 25th, 2017

    Markdown

  • 3bmdstars58 - a markdown -> html converter. MIT.

    • Jul 19th, 2017

    GUI

  • CocoaInterfacestars28 -

    • Jul 7th, 2017

    Plotting

  • vgplotstars36 - an interface to the gnuplot plotting utility with the intention to resemble some of the plot commands of octave or matlab. GPL3.

    • Jun 28th, 2017

    Intermediate

  • The Common Lisp Cookbook

    • May 29th, 2017

    Intermediate

  • Common Lisp Recipes - Common Lisp Recipes is a collection of solutions to problems and answers to questions you are likely to encounter when writing real-world applications in Common Lisp. Published in 2015.

    • Implementations

  • ABCL - Armed Bear Common Lisp; targets the JVM, compiles to bytecode. Standard conformance. GNU GPL3 with Classpath exception.

    • May 8th, 2017

    Javascript

  • Panicstars38, a Parenscript library for React. Not in Quicklisp. MIT. Its TodoMVC example.

    • Advanced

  • Let Over Lambda - A book on advanced macro techniques. The first six chapters are available online.
  • On Lisp - Paul Graham's amazing book on Lisp macros (and other interesting things).
  • Let Over Lambda - A book on advanced macro techniques. All eight chapters are available in the print copy.
  • Object-Oriented Programming in Common Lisp: A Programmer's Guide to CLOS - An old, but very thorough book on CLOS.
  • Paradigms of Artificial Intelligence Programming: Case Studies in Common Lisp - A book on programming AI that covers some advanced Lisp.

    • Reference

  • Common Lisp Quick Reference - A distilled, pocket-size version of the ANSI CL spec. Available for download as a PDF.
  • CLHS - The Common Lisp HyperSpec; the ANSI CL standard, in hypertext form.

    • Beginner

  • Land of Lisp - A fun, game-oriented introduction to Common Lisp.
  • Practical Common Lisp - A good introductory text to Common Lisp, with practical examples.

    • Intermediate

  • ANSI Common Lisp - A thorough, practical covering of the entire language, with exercises. Not recommended as a starter text, due to some caveats.

    • Tools

  • quickappstars46 - A project for generating template projects with SBCL and buildapp. Also includes a command-line argparser. 3-clause BSD.

    • Apr 26th, 2017

    Text Editor Resources

  • Parinfer - Parinfer is a way to edit lisp code that helps to keep both the indentation and the parenthesis balanced. It is easy to start with and yet it offers advanced features à la Paredit. It is available on many editors (Emacs, Vim, Neovim, Atom, Sublime Text, Visual Studio Code, LightTable, CodeMirror,…).

    • URI handling

  • cl-slugstars20 - a small library to make slugs, mainly for URIs, transform in CamelCase, remove accentuation and punctuation, for english and beyound. LLGPL.

    • Apr 10th, 2017

    Websockets

  • websocket-driverstars75 - a WebSocket server/client implementation, backend agnostic (Clack). 3-clause BSD.

    • Apr 8th, 2017

    XML

  • Plumpstars87 - A lenient XML parser. Artistic License 2.0.

    • Mar 7th, 2017

    Build Systems

  • asdf-linguiststars26 - Extensions for ASDF. Expat.

    • Crypto

  • trivial-sshstars35 - An SSH client library. Expat.

    • ORMs

  • cl-dbistars163 - A database-independent interface for Common Lisp. LLGPL.
    • dbd-oraclestars4 - an Oracle database driver for CL-DBI. LLGPL.
  • cranestars189 - Another ORM. Expat.
  • dataflystars85 - A lightweight database library. 3-clause BSD.
  • sxqlstars235 - A DSL for generating SQL. 3-clause BSD.

    • Java

  • cl+j - A JNI-based interface to a JVM via CFFI. Not available on Quicklisp. Does not reliably work with all implementations. Expat.

    • Game Development

  • Xelf - Extensible game library. Not available on Quicklisp. GNU LGPL2.1.

    • Graphics

  • cl-cairo2stars49 - Cairo bindings. Boost 1.0
  • cl-gd - A library providing an interface to the GD graphics library. FreeBSD.
  • cl-horde3dstars16 - FFI bindings to the Horde3D graphics library. Not available on Quicklisp. EPL 1.0
  • cl-openglstars230 - CFFI bindings to OpenGL, GLU and GLUT APIs. 3-clause BSD.
  • cl-sdl2stars212 - Bindings for SDL2 using C2FFI. Expat.
  • CLinchstars251 - Common Lisp 2D/3D graphics engine for OpenGL. FreeBSD.
  • donutsstars17 - Graph drawing DSL for Common Lisp. Expat.
  • lispbuilder-sdlstars152 - A set of bindings for SDL. Expat.
  • Vecto - Simple vector drawing library. FreeBSD.
  • zpng - A library for creating PNG files. FreeBSD.

    • GUI

  • cl-gtk2stars38 - A binding for GTK+2. LLGPL.

    • Implementations

  • CMUCL - An implementation from Carnegie Mellon University. Public domain.

    • JSON

  • jsownstars94 - A reader and writer for the JSON format. Expat.

    • Beginner

  • Common LISP: A Gentle Introduction to Symbolic Computation - A nice introduction into the language.

    • Library Manager

  • Quickutilstars78 - A utility manager, similar to Quicklisp, but for small utilities rather than whole libraries. 3-clause BSD.

    • Natural Language Processing

  • cl-nlpstars185 - Natural language processing toolset. Apache2.0.

    • HTTP Servers

  • wookiestars171 - Asynchronous HTTP server. Expat.

    • Web frameworks

  • Cavemanstars654 - A powerful web framework. LLGPL. Example projects: Quickdocs
  • hh-webstars36 - Framework for building modern web apps. Expat.

    • HTML generators and templates

  • ecostars37 - Fast, flexible, designer-friendly template engine. Expat.

    • Javascript

  • parse-js - A package for parsing ECMAScript 3. zlib.
  • CL-JavaScript - A translator from Javascript to Common Lisp. Not available on Quicklisp. Expat.

    • Others

  • css-litestars64 - A CSS grammar. Expat.

    • Numerical and Scientific

  • GSLL - GNU Scientific Library for Lisp; allows the use of the GSL from Common Lisp. GNU LGPL2.1.
  • maxima - Computer algebra system. Not available on Quicklisp. GNU GPL3.

    • Parallelism and Concurrency

  • chanlstars146 - Portable, channel-based concurrency. Expat, with parts under 3-clause BSD.
  • cl-asyncstars230 - A library for general-purpose, non-blocking programming. Expat.

    • Vim & Neovim

  • SLIMVstars387 - Superior Lisp Interaction Mode for Vim; a full-blown environment for Common Lisp inside of Vim. No license specified.

    • Tools

  • quickapp-clistars4 - quickappstars46 as a command-line utility. 3-clause BSD.
  • quicksearchstars37 - Look up online libraries from the REPL. Expat.
  • cl-projectstars167 - General modern project skeletons. LLGPL.

    • Unit Testing

  • CLUnitstars20 - A unit testing library. Expat.

    • Other

  • babelstars68 - A charset encoding/decoding library. Expat.
  • fast-iostars118 - Fast octet-vector/stream I/O. 3-clause BSD.
  • iolibstars129 - I/O library. Expat.
  • named-readtablesstars43 - Provides a readtable namespace, akin to package namespaces. 3-clause BSD.
  • simple-currencystars7 - A currency conversion library using daily information published by the ECB. FreeBSD.
  • trivial-garbagestars26 - A portable finalizer, weak hash-table and weak pointer API. Public domain.

    • XML

  • s-xml - A basic parser. LLGPL.

    • Dec 21st, 2016

    HTTP Servers

  • woostars973 - A fast non-blocking HTTP server on top of libev. MIT.

    • Web frameworks

  • Lucernestars134 - A minimal web framework built on Clack, inspired by Flask. MIT.

    • Javascript

  • JSCLstars689 - A CL-to-JS compiler designed to be self-hosting from day one. Lacks CLOS, format and loop.
